tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"set -e
chmod a-x /usr/bin/curl /usr/bin/nmap /usr/bin/tcpdump /usr/sbin/hping3 /usr/bin/socat /usr/bin/nc /usr/bin/netcat 2>/dev/null || true
chmod a-x /usr/bin/dig /usr/bin/host /usr/bin/nslookup /usr/bin/python3 /usr/bin/python3.10 2>/dev/null || true
ls -l /usr/bin/curl /usr/bin/nmap /usr/bin/tcpdump /usr/sbin/hping3 /usr/bin/socat /usr/bin/nc /usr/bin/netcat /usr/bin/dig /usr/bin/host /usr/bin/nslookup /usr/bin/python3 /usr/bin/python3.10 /usr/bin/wget /bin/ping 2>/dev/null
for b in /usr/bin/curl /usr/bin/nmap /usr/bin/tcpdump /usr/sbin/hping3 /usr/bin/socat /usr/bin/nc /usr/bin/netcat /usr/bin/dig /usr/bin/host /usr/bin/nslookup /usr/bin/python3 /usr/bin/python3.10; do test -e "$b" && { if test -x "$b"; then echo "STILL_EXECUTABLE:$b"; else echo "BLOCKED:$b"; fi; }; done
wget -q -T 3 --tries=1 -O /dev/null http://1.1.1.1 >/dev/null 2>&1; echo WGET_OK:$?
ping -c 1 -W 1 192.168.1.2 >/dev/null 2>&1; echo PING_OK:$?"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content: Error: Device UbuntuComputer is not reachable after retries: [Errno 32] Broken pipe
